perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a grey newsboy cap and a white T-shirt with a 'Mr. Peanut' mascot stands in a bright indoor setting, excitedly holding a dark blue shipping box. (2) He moves to a wooden table, places the box down, and tears open the security strip on the cardboard. (3) He opens the box to reveal two white t-shirts inside plastic packaging, one featuring a Pikachu graphic. (4) He retrieves a small circular plastic container holding a small accessory and examines it. (5) He pulls out a heart-shaped gold-toned paper clip and holds it up to the camera with a wide smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking about returning to the office and a recent purchase. (2) The sound of cardboard tearing and plastic rustling is heard over the music. (3) The male speaker continues his narration with an excited tone. A female voice briefly responds from off-camera. (4) The male speaker continues to describe the items with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone until the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '回到辦公室' (Back to the office) - Functional, energetic. (2) '第一件事情' (The first thing) - Functional. (3) '就是看我上禮拜出差之前' (Is to see what I got before my business trip last week) - Functional. (4) '我在HUMAN MADE買的寶可夢' (The Pokemon stuff I bought at HUMAN MADE) - Functional. (5) '很多人都買不到' (Many people can't buy it) - Hook, proud. (6) '包含我老婆的親戚朋友' (Including my wife's relatives and friends) - Functional. (7) '但我有了' (But I have it) - Hook, proud. (8) '直接簡單開箱' (A direct and simple unboxing) - Functional. (9) 'HUMAN MADE' - Brand name. (10) '竟然能搶到兩件' (Actually managed to grab two) - Hook, surprised. (11) '助理這是什麼' (Assistant, what is this?) - Functional. (12) '迴紋針' (Paper clip) - Functional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Box Opening -> Item Reveal -> Detailed Accessory Examination

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator visible; 1 female assistant heard off-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a white graphic tee with a cartoon peanut mascot.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor room with white walls, a wooden table, and a monitor visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a lifestyle unboxing experience of a limited-edition fashion collaboration (Human Made x Pokemon), emphasizing the scarcity of the items and the creator's excitement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator describes the purchase as a personal acquisition made during a business trip.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's distinct newsboy cap and variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical high-energy content creator style from the Taiwan region, focusing on consumer culture and limited-edition goods.
